description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style, featuring large glass windows and clean geometric lines. The front facade includes a paved entryway, a small landscaped area with a tree, and a prominent balcony above the entrance. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and additional greenery, all enclosed by a privacy wall. The side views reveal multiple outdoor seating areas, additional trees, and a driveway or parking space. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with extensive use of transparent and semi-transparent surfaces for natural light. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a backyard pool, featuring minimalist landscaping and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, a balcony above, and a landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, additional trees, and the full length of the backyard with the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the swimming pool, sun loungers, and large glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals more outdoor seating, trees, and the privacy wall enclosing the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, steps, a balcony above, and minimalistic landscaping
